## Meeting Purpose

[Interviewing Shaina Louis-Jean for the Engagement Manager role.](https://fathom.video/share/nYFrxP32zQ7yypzogsM7M-QTzyHafsLV?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Role Shift:** The "Account Strategist" role is now "Engagement Manager" (EM), owning renewals and client strategy, not content production.](https://fathom.video/share/nYFrxP32zQ7yypzogsM7M-QTzyHafsLV?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
  - [**Candidate Fit:** Shaina's experience managing up to 12 accounts and using data-backed QBRs for renewals aligns perfectly with the EM's core function.](https://fathom.video/share/nYFrxP32zQ7yypzogsM7M-QTzyHafsLV?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
  - [**Case Study:** Shaina saved a high-risk account (Watts Water) by using Power BI data to prove ROI and expand services by $10k/month.](https://fathom.video/share/nYFrxP32zQ7yypzogsM7M-QTzyHafsLV?tab=summary&timestamp=771.0)
  - [**Key Skill:** The ideal EM is a strategic partner for client decision-makers, using metrics to drive renewals and growth, not a content editor.](https://fathom.video/share/nYFrxP32zQ7yypzogsM7M-QTzyHafsLV?tab=summary&timestamp=1900.0)

## Topics

### The New Engagement Manager Role

  - [**Context:** A new org structure redefines the role from "Account Strategist" to "Engagement Manager."](https://fathom.video/share/nYFrxP32zQ7yypzogsM7M-QTzyHafsLV?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
  - [**Primary Function:** Own client relationships and renewals.](https://fathom.video/share/nYFrxP32zQ7yypzogsM7M-QTzyHafsLV?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [**Goal:** Be a trusted expert for client decision-makers.](https://fathom.video/share/nYFrxP32zQ7yypzogsM7M-QTzyHafsLV?tab=summary&timestamp=1900.0)
      - [**Focus:** Account health, project management, and coordinating internal teams.](https://fathom.video/share/nYFrxP32zQ7yypzogsM7M-QTzyHafsLV?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [**Account Load:** Scaling from 8 accounts to 12 by Q1 2026.](https://fathom.video/share/nYFrxP32zQ7yypzogsM7M-QTzyHafsLV?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
  - [**Support Structure:**](https://fathom.video/share/nYFrxP32zQ7yypzogsM7M-QTzyHafsLV?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
      - [**Pooled Directors:** Strategic experts (e.g., SEO audits, AI strategy) engaged by EMs for performance turnarounds.](https://fathom.video/share/nYFrxP32zQ7yypzogsM7M-QTzyHafsLV?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
      - [**Delivery Team:** Manages all client deliverables.](https://fathom.video/share/nYFrxP32zQ7yypzogsM7M-QTzyHafsLV?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)

### Candidate Experience & Approach

  - [**Background:** 7+ years in account management, primarily with mid-size and enterprise clients.](https://fathom.video/share/nYFrxP32zQ7yypzogsM7M-QTzyHafsLV?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
  - [**Renewal Strategy:** Uses data-backed QBRs to proactively manage client health and secure renewals.](https://fathom.video/share/nYFrxP32zQ7yypzogsM7M-QTzyHafsLV?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)
  - [**Communication Cadence:**](https://fathom.video/share/nYFrxP32zQ7yypzogsM7M-QTzyHafsLV?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
      - [**Internal:** Weekly pod meetings (2 days before client calls) for alignment; weekly leadership syncs for full account downloads.](https://fathom.video/share/nYFrxP32zQ7yypzogsM7M-QTzyHafsLV?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
      - [**External:** Weekly/bi-weekly client meetings; agendas sent 24 hours prior.](https://fathom.video/share/nYFrxP32zQ7yypzogsM7M-QTzyHafsLV?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
  - [**SEO & Tech Skills:**](https://fathom.video/share/nYFrxP32zQ7yypzogsM7M-QTzyHafsLV?tab=summary&timestamp=615.0)
      - [**SEO:** Experience with topic clusters, schema, and meta descriptions.](https://fathom.video/share/nYFrxP32zQ7yypzogsM7M-QTzyHafsLV?tab=summary&timestamp=615.0)
      - [**Platforms:** Familiar with Looker, GA4, GSC, SEMrush, Screaming Frog, and Microsoft Clarity.](https://fathom.video/share/nYFrxP32zQ7yypzogsM7M-QTzyHafsLV?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)

### Case Study: Watts Water Account Turnaround

  - [**Problem:** A high-risk account facing churn.](https://fathom.video/share/nYFrxP32zQ7yypzogsM7M-QTzyHafsLV?tab=summary&timestamp=792.0)
  - [**Solution:** Gained access to the client's Power BI data to prove ROI and identify strategic gaps.](https://fathom.video/share/nYFrxP32zQ7yypzogsM7M-QTzyHafsLV?tab=summary&timestamp=792.0)
  - [**Outcome:** Expanded services by $10k/month by adding paid search and growing SEO content.](https://fathom.video/share/nYFrxP32zQ7yypzogsM7M-QTzyHafsLV?tab=summary&timestamp=957.0)
  - [**Role:** Strategic lead and project manager; supported the SEO team on a 4,000-blog audit by creating AI-driven content clusters and alt image tags.](https://fathom.video/share/nYFrxP32zQ7yypzogsM7M-QTzyHafsLV?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)

### Project Management & Quality Control

  - [**Process:** Uses ClickUp (similar to Growthx's Linear) for project management.](https://fathom.video/share/nYFrxP32zQ7yypzogsM7M-QTzyHafsLV?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
    1.  [**Briefing:** Creates a detailed brief with timelines and QA schedules.](https://fathom.video/share/nYFrxP32zQ7yypzogsM7M-QTzyHafsLV?tab=summary&timestamp=1181.0)
    2.  [**Team Alignment:** Confirms feasibility of dates with the team *before* setting client expectations.](https://fathom.video/share/nYFrxP32zQ7yypzogsM7M-QTzyHafsLV?tab=summary&timestamp=1359.0)
    3.  [**Handoff:** Pings the team on Slack to review the brief and ask questions.](https://fathom.video/share/nYFrxP32zQ7yypzogsM7M-QTzyHafsLV?tab=summary&timestamp=1246.0)
  - [**Quality Control (QC):**](https://fathom.video/share/nYFrxP32zQ7yypzogsM7M-QTzyHafsLV?tab=summary&timestamp=1594.0)
      - [**Internal Revisions:** Conducts internal reviews to ensure quality before client delivery.](https://fathom.video/share/nYFrxP32zQ7yypzogsM7M-QTzyHafsLV?tab=summary&timestamp=1643.0)
      - [**Scalable QA:** For high volume (e.g., 58 articles/week), would use a "biopsy" approach, scanning for known client pain points and operator-specific issues.](https://fathom.video/share/nYFrxP32zQ7yypzogsM7M-QTzyHafsLV?tab=summary&timestamp=1697.0)

### Growthx's Expectations & Goals

  - [**90-Day Success Metrics:**](https://fathom.video/share/nYFrxP32zQ7yypzogsM7M-QTzyHafsLV?tab=summary&timestamp=1803.0)
      - [**Month 1:** Own client accounts and strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/nYFrxP32zQ7yypzogsM7M-QTzyHafsLV?tab=summary&timestamp=1803.0)
      - [**Primary Goal:** Drive renewals and proactively flag accounts needing strategic intervention.](https://fathom.video/share/nYFrxP32zQ7yypzogsM7M-QTzyHafsLV?tab=summary&timestamp=1803.0)
      - [**Platform Curiosity:** Interest in AI workflows is key, as the company is evolving into a product-and-services model.](https://fathom.video/share/nYFrxP32zQ7yypzogsM7M-QTzyHafsLV?tab=summary&timestamp=1868.0)
  - [**Ideal EM Profile:** A strategic partner for client decision-makers, focused on KPIs and metrics that matter, not a content editor.](https://fathom.video/share/nYFrxP32zQ7yypzogsM7M-QTzyHafsLV?tab=summary&timestamp=1900.0)
  - [**2026 Department Goals:**](https://fathom.video/share/nYFrxP32zQ7yypzogsM7M-QTzyHafsLV?tab=summary&timestamp=2007.0)
      - [Scale account load from 8 to 12 per EM.](https://fathom.video/share/nYFrxP32zQ7yypzogsM7M-QTzyHafsLV?tab=summary&timestamp=2007.0)
      - [Improve production team efficiency through EM organization and prioritization.](https://fathom.video/share/nYFrxP32zQ7yypzogsM7M-QTzyHafsLV?tab=summary&timestamp=2007.0)
      - [Document and share effective EM processes department-wide.](https://fathom.video/share/nYFrxP32zQ7yypzogsM7M-QTzyHafsLV?tab=summary&timestamp=2082.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Shaina Louis-Jean:** Email Andi Bailey with any follow-up questions.](https://fathom.video/share/nYFrxP32zQ7yypzogsM7M-QTzyHafsLV?tab=summary&timestamp=2128.0)
